channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HARISH] Harish Textile Engineers Ltd. Faces Fine of Rs. 50,000 Over Delayed Reply in NCLT Matter
item.description:
Harish Textile Engineers Ltd. has received an Order Sheet of Hearing from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, in a matter involving M/s. Kamlesh Corporation. The Company's reply was filed with a delay, which the Tribunal condoned subject to a cost of Rs. 50,000 to be deposited in the Prime Minister’s National Relief Fund (PMNRF) within 7 days. The matter has been adjourned to 14 April, 2026. The Company is seeking legal advice and will attend/respond at the scheduled hearing accordingly.

  • Harish Textile Engineers Ltd. has received an Order Sheet of Hearing from the NCLT, Mumbai Bench, in a matter involving M/s. Kamlesh Corporation
  • The Company's reply was filed with a delay, which the Tribunal condoned subject to a cost of Rs. 50,000 to be deposited in the PMNRF within 7 days
  • The matter has been adjourned to 14 April, 2026
  • The Company is seeking legal advice and will attend/respond at the scheduled hearing accordingly

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Harish Textile Engineers Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [NUVOCO] Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd Subsidiary, Vadraj Cement Limited, Approves Allotment of INR 300,00,00,000 Series B CCDs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Vadraj Cement Limited, has approved the allotment of 30,000 unsecured unlisted, compulsorily convertible debentures (Series B CCDs) worth INR 300,00,00,000 to certain investors. The allotment was made on a private placement basis as per the terms and conditions set out in the securities subscription and debenture trustee agreement executed by and between the Company, Vadraj and Beacon Trusteeship Limited.

  • Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd's subsidiary, Vadraj Cement Limited, approved the allotment of INR 300,00,00,000 Series B CCDs to certain investors.
  • The allotment was made on a private placement basis.
  • The Series B CCDs are unsecured, unlisted, and compulsorily convertible.
  • The face value of each CCD is INR 1,00,000.
  • The CCDs are convertible into 2,604 fully paid-up equity shares of Vadraj having a face value of INR 10 each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [TIL] TIL Ltd Announces Rights Issue Committee Meeting Outcome with Key Dates
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TIL Ltd, in accordance with SEBI regulations and stock exchange approvals, held a Rights Issue Committee Meeting on March 20, 2026. The meeting resulted in the approval of the terms for the Rights Issue, which includes the opening and closing dates, last date for on-market renunciation of rights entitlements, and date of closure of off-market transfer of rights entitlements. The rights entitlement of eligible equity shareholders will be credited prior to the issue opening date. The issue involves 1,20,91,760 partly paid-up Equity Shares with an approximate total amount of ₹ 199,51,40,400/-.

  • TIL Ltd held a Rights Issue Committee Meeting on March 20, 2026
  • Approval of terms for the Rights Issue
  • Key dates for the Rights Issue announced
  • 1,20,91,760 partly paid-up Equity Shares to be issued
  • Approximate total amount for the securities is ₹ 199,51,40,400/-

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TIL LTD. | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [AIRFLOA] Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd Secures ₹ 22.91 Crores Order from BEML Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd has announced receiving a new order worth ₹ 22.91 Crores from BEML Limited, Bangalore. The order is for the Design, Manufacture, Supply, Testing & Commissioning of Lighting Systems including CMC Spares & tools for the Cars of Chennai Metro Rail Project – Phase -II. The payment terms are 100% within 45 days from the date of respective supplies, with delivery commencing in November 2026 and completion expected within 17 months. Inspection will be conducted by BEML at their premises along with other usual terms & conditions as specified in the purchase order.

  • Order worth ₹ 22.91 Crores from BEML Limited
  • Design, Manufacture, Supply, Testing & Commissioning of Lighting Systems including CMC Spares & tools for the Cars of Chennai Metro Rail Project – Phase -II
  • Payment terms 100% within 45 days from the date of respective supplies
  • Delivery commencing in November 2026 and completion within 17 months
  • Inspection by BEML at their premises

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [NUVOCO] Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd Executes Series B CCDs Agreements
item.description:
Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd has executed the securities subscription and debenture trustee agreement and the option agreement in relation to the Series B CCDs. The proceeds from the issuance of Series B CCDs will be utilized towards repayment of any amounts due to the Company for the financial assistance provided to or in relation to Vadraj, and payment of costs and expenses in connection with issuance of the Series B CCDs. The Option Agreement is entered between the Company, Vadraj, the Debenture Trustee, and Niyogi Enterprise Private Limited. The Company, as the call option holder, has the right to purchase the Series B CCDs from the Investors on identified dates/events as set out in the Option Agreement.

  • Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd has executed the securities subscription and debenture trustee agreement and the option agreement in relation to the Series B CCDs.
  • The proceeds from the issuance of Series B CCDs will be utilized towards repayment of any amounts due to the Company for the financial assistance provided to or in relation to Vadraj, and payment of costs and expenses in connection with issuance of the Series B CCDs.
  • The Option Agreement is entered between the Company, Vadraj, the Debenture Trustee, and Niyogi Enterprise Private Limited.
  • The Company, as the call option holder, has the right to purchase the Series B CCDs from the Investors on identified dates/events as set out in the Option Agreement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [REMLIFE] Supha Pharmachem Limited Announces Commencement of Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Supha Pharmachem Limited, formerly Remedium Lifecare Limited, has announced the commencement of a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) on 17th March, 2026. The company has made a Public Announcement (Form A) inviting claims from creditors, which can be submitted by 31st March, 2026. The Interim Resolution Professional (IRP) for this process is Mr. Rajesh Jhunjhunwala.

  • Supha Pharmachem Limited is undergoing a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) as ordered by the NCLT.
  • The last date for submission of claims by creditors is 31st March, 2026.
  • The Interim Resolution Professional for this process is Mr. Rajesh Jhunjhunwala.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Remedium Lifecare Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [GREENPOWER] Orient Green Power Company Completes Erection of 6.6 MW Wind Turbine Generators
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Orient Green Power Company Ltd, through its subsidiary Gamma Green Power Private Limited, has successfully completed the erection of 2 out of 3 Wind Turbine Generators (WTGs) of 3.3 MW each, totaling 6.6 MW, in Tiruchirappalli District, Tamil Nadu. The service connection has been received on March 20, 2026, with commissioning expected shortly. The remaining 3.3 MW capacity is still in progress, and updates will be provided in due course. This development signifies the company's entry into power generation through higher-capacity WTGs.

  • Orient Green Power Company completes erection of 6.6 MW wind turbine generators
  • Company's entry into power generation through higher-capacity WTGs
  • 2 out of 3 WTGs of 3.3 MW each erected by subsidiary Gamma Green Power Private Limited
  • Service connection received on March 20, 2026
  • Commissioning of the said WTGs expected shortly

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORIENT GREEN POWER COMPANY LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [NETWEB] Re-appointment of Managing Director and Whole Time Directors for 5 years at Netweb Technologies India Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Netweb Technologies India Ltd has announced the re-appointment of its Chairman and Managing Director, Mr. Sanjay Lodha, and Whole-time Directors, Mr. Vivek Lodha, Mr. Niraj Lodha, and Mr. Navin Lodha, for a period of 5 years. The re-appointments were approved by the shareholders through a postal ballot process on March 20, 2026. The re-appointed directors will take office from August 14, 2026, to August 13, 2031.

  • Re-appointment of Mr. Sanjay Lodha as Chairman and Managing Director for 5 years
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Vivek Lodha, Mr. Niraj Lodha, and Mr. Navin Lodha as Whole-time Directors for 5 years
  • Re-appointments approved by shareholders through postal ballot process
  • New terms of office for re-appointed directors from August 14, 2026, to August 13, 2031
  • No debarment from holding office for any of the re-appointed directors

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Netweb Technologies India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NDTV] NDTV's GoodTimes Channel Acquisition to Complete in 3 Months
item.description:
🔥 Trending

New Delhi Television Ltd (NDTV) has updated on the acquisition of the GoodTimes Channel from Lifestyle & Media Broadcasting Limited. The transaction, which was earlier expected to be completed by September 19, 2025 and December 18, 2025, is now anticipated to be finalized within the next three months. The completion of the proposed transaction is contingent upon the receipt of necessary statutory and regulatory approvals and the fulfillment of customary conditions precedent.

  • NDTV's acquisition of GoodTimes Channel is progressing
  • Expected to be completed within 3 months
  • Transaction was earlier expected to be completed by September 19, 2025 and December 18, 2025
  • Completion subject to regulatory approvals
  • Dependent on fulfillment of customary conditions precedent

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NEW DELHI TELEVISION LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [KACL] Kaiser Corporation Ltd. Announces Board Meeting for Scheme of Merger with Emazing Deals Limited
item.description:
Kaiser Corporation Ltd. has announced a Board Meeting scheduled for 277th March 2026. The meeting will consider and approve the Scheme of Merger by Absorption of Emazing Deals Limited into Kaiser Corporation Limited and their respective shareholders. The merger will be in accordance with the provisions of Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013 and other applicable laws, rules, and regulations. The Trading Window for dealing in the securities of the Company will be closed for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives from March 20, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the outcome of the Board Meeting to the public.

  • Kaiser Corporation Ltd. announced a Board Meeting for 277th March 2026
  • The meeting will consider and approve the Scheme of Merger with Emazing Deals Limited
  • The merger will be in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013 and other applicable laws
  • Trading Window for dealing in the securities of the Company will be closed from March 20, 2026
  • The window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the outcome of the Board Meeting to the public

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaiser Corporation Limited | Category: Merger
